title: [Epic] Advanced Interactivity and Object Data Fragments
body:
This epic tracks the implementation of advanced interactivity fragments spanning two new collections: `interactive-media` and `advanced-object-data`.

The goal is to provide next-level capabilities beyond standard Liferay DXP components, including complex data inputs and gamified marketing tools.

issues.title: Implement Video Hotspots Fragment
issues.body: Create a new fragment in the `interactive-media` collection that overlays clickable hotspots onto a video element. Configuration should allow defining timestamped frames and positional data.

issues.title: Implement Scratch-Off Promo Card Fragment
issues.body: Create a new fragment in the `interactive-media` collection featuring an HTML5 canvas overlay that users can 'scratch off' via mouse or touch to reveal underlying promo content.

issues.title: Implement Data Grid with Inline Editing
issues.body: Create a new fragment in the `advanced-object-data` collection using a lightweight grid library (e.g., Tabulator or Grid.js). The grid should connect to Liferay Headless APIs for object retrieval and allow inline cell editing that patches the object via API.

issues.title: Implement Interactive Floorplan / Map Annotator
issues.body: Create a new fragment in the `advanced-object-data` collection. Users can upload a floorplan/map image and see static pins from a Liferay Object, and optionally (if configured) click to create new pins that save coordinates via the Headless API.
